# New Google Cloud Startup Success Manager

**From:** Kazi Nafis Rehan <kazinafis@xwf.google.com>
**Date:** Thu, 23 Apr 2026 00:04:48 +0900
**Source:** [View original](https://sl.cloudplatformonline.com/t/113425/sc/711dc175-fb15-4bfc-bfc9-e7a00dbdfd0b/NB2HI4DTHIXS653XO4XGO33PM5WGKLTDN5WS63LBOBZS643FMFZGG2BPGE3DAMBLIFWXA2DJORUGKYLUOJSSWUDBOJVXOYLZFQVU233VNZ2GC2LOFNLGSZLXFQVUGQJLHE2DANBTH5SW45DSPE6WO3LBNFWCM43POVZGGZJ5M4======/GVRTGNJXGJRDGYRXGI4WMYJUGI4GEY3CGQ2TIOJYMYZTKMBZMRSDAOLGGNQTGMBR/www-google-com-maps-search-1600-amphitheatre-parkway-mountain-view-ca-94043)

---

Hi Will,

Great to e-meet you, I'm Kazi, reaching out from the Google Cloud team
dedicated to thefocus.ai.

Due to some restructuring within the Google Cloud territory management, a
new Account Executive has been assigned for thefocus.ai. I am reaching out
to you to introduce you to the new Account Executive.

We would love to have a brief discussion with you to know more about your
company, challenges and goals to understand how we can better assist you in
your startup journey.

With that, we would also like to have a discussion with you regarding our
Google Cloud Startup program where we have been investing in the startup
companies by offering free credits for up to US$ 200K.

Please let us know what date and time works best for you to have a brief
virtual chat. You can also easily schedule some time with us using our
calendar link: Appointment Schedule
<https://sl.cloudplatformonline.com/t/113425/sc/711dc175-fb15-4bfc-bfc9--google-com-calendar-u-0-appointments-schedules-aczssz2rdtjwlkzk5yd>
.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,

Kazi Nafis
--

<https://sl.cloudplatformonline.com/t/113425/sc/711dc175-fb15-4bfc-bfc9--google-com-gcp>

*Kazi Nafis Rehan*

Sales Development Rep - Startups

Google Cloud Platform - North America

M: +1 (650) 763 0530

E: kazinafis@xwf.google.com

Book a Meeting
<https://sl.cloudplatformonline.com/t/113425/sc/711dc175-fb15-4bfc-bfc9--google-com-calendar-u-0-appointments-schedules-aczssz2rdtjwlkzk5yd>
